did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a protocol describing the methodology for data acquisition, annotation, and privacy preservation for a future machine learning study. It does not report results obtained using AI/ML; rather, it outlines the plan to develop deep learning models for lesion detection, segmentation, and classification in dermatology.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
